title: Metabolic parameters determination in acid citrated plasma
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"blrib","text":"Diet-induced obesity by administration of a western-type diet high in fat and sugar to mice may result in an elevation of plasma total and LDL-cholesterol levels, triglycerides and the levels of the liver enzymes alkaline phosphatases and aspartate (AST) and alanine aminotransferases (ALT).","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"4l09v","text":"-The acid citrate solution is best kept at +4°C and made fresh every month.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"ah6vt","text":"-Concentrations of plasma metabolic parameters need to be multiplied by the dilution factor 3.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}

steps: Collect 300μl blood from the retro-orbital sinus using a capillary tube containing acid citrate and collect the blood in an eppendorf tube containing 30μl acid citrate (1/10 dilution). Do not include the first two drops of blood. Acid citrate (50 ml): dissolve 1.25g trisodiumcitrate dihydrate (85 mM) and 0.82g citric acid monohydrate (78 mM) in 20 ml milliQ water and add MilliQ water until volume is 50 ml. pH should be 4.5. Trisodium citrate dihydrate Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #S1804 citric acid monohydrate Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #33114
Plasma is obtained by centrifuging the blood in an eppendorf centrifuge for 10 min at 10,000 rpm. Collect supernatant.
Mix 50μl of acid citrated plasma with 100μl metabolic buffer consisting of 0.1 M Tris pH 7.5 and 0.15 M NaCl in a 1 ml sample cup provided ny the routine lab of UZ Leuven, Leuven, Belgium.

Transfer samples to the routine lab of UZ Leuven, Leuven, Belgium for the measurement of plasma levels of total cholesterol, LDL- and HDL-cholesterol, triglycerides, alkaline phosphatases and aspartate and alanine aminotransferases.
creator: Bianca Hemmeryckx
